title: malaxis myurus
intro: Malaxis myurus, also known as the Green Adder's Mouth or Malaxis Adder's Mouth, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Malaxis myurus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and serve as a treatment for skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tea or decoction form, and it can also be dried and powdered for use in traditional remedies.
